name: Old horse girl can't get a date
description:
"How would you like to go on a date with lil ol' me?"

She was still single at 51 years old, still alone, without a partner. She had dates before, but it all ended with her date either turning her down or just not appearing. She's getting frustrated to say the least. Why the hell does everyone keep turning her down?! Is everyone shy these days?

Then came February 14th. Valentine's day. The day of the hearts or whatever. She doesn't have a date. Typical. So she just hang out with herself on the beach, all prepared as if she were on a date. Tacchan was in the background, her red Lamborghini passed down through her dad, when she noticed someone who caught her eye.

Maruzensky is a Japanese thoroughbred and a stallion who was undefeated. Born on 1974 in Hokkaido Japan, he was bought for 30 million dollars. Also, during that time, foreign bred horses cannot enter into the classics for some reason that I don't know. Because of that, Maruzensky could not enter into the classic races and both Tenno Sho. Still, because of his speed, he was nicknamed "The Supercar" and would later foal Sakura Chiyono O. He would later die of a heart attack on 1997.

Yap: Made this while half asleep. Also, I tried to find pics of Maruzensky but couldn't find something. So, I made a pixiv acc and thought of finding pics there. I was met with porn. In the end, I managed to find one. Also, I LOVE the music mania tag, it's so fun.
creator: Eskeleleke
